kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Inventory Page
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: And The Session Is Established Successfully
Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Add to cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 Add Product To Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Inventory Page
Wait For Login To Complete
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Products' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Products' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Text 'Products' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Text 'Products' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: When User Selects The First Product
And User Clicks Add To Cart Button
Then The Product Is Added To Cart
And The Cart Badge Displays Correct Item Count
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Text 'Products' did not appear in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 Complete Order Checkout

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Inventory Page
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: When User Selects The First Product
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And User Clicks Add To Cart Button
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: When User Navigates To The Cart
Navigate To Cart
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Your Cart' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Your Cart' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Text 'Your Cart' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Text 'Your Cart' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Then User Accesses The Checkout Page
And User Fills In The Shipping Information
And User Proceeds To Payment Review
And A Confirmation Page Displays With Order Number
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Text 'Your Cart' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
